hero.title: When one astronaut looks at the galaxy, he sees only part of the truth
hero.subtitle: A next-generation decentralized platform where every member becomes part of a collective mind. Here, ideas are born, discussed, and evolve from hypothesis to truth through collaborative thinking, open dialogue, and transparent decision-making.
hero.description: CosmoFusion DAO brings together people with diverse backgrounds and perspectives to find the best solutions, preserve knowledge, and build a community where every contribution matters. We believe that truth is not a final destination, but a continuous journey forward—where every voice counts and the experience of the past shapes the future. Join us to be part of the evolution of ideas, contribute to a common cause, and help create a space for open innovation and collective growth.
hero.alt: A lone astronaut contemplates a majestic galaxy

visual.description: An astronaut on a planet looking at the galaxy
visual.alt: A lone astronaut contemplates a majestic galaxy

idea.title: Idea
idea.description: Imagine an astronaut looking at a galaxy from a distant planet. He sees the beauty, but does he truly understand the nature of what he observes? The same goes for us—each of us looks at the world through our own lens, making decisions based on a limited perspective. But what if thousands of astronauts looked at the same galaxy from different planets at the same time? What if their visions merged into a single picture of truth?

hypotize.title: Hypothesis
hypotize.description: CosmoFusion DAO is a platform where ideas travel from hypothesis to truth through collective thinking

list: We are all lonely astronauts in the cosmos of decisions
The astronaut's visor reflects only what he wants to see
When thousands of astronauts look at one galaxy
From a lone astronaut to a collective mind
Truth in motion is not just a beautiful phrase
Become part of the collective mind
arr.title: Table of Contents

evolution.title: From a single astronaut to a collective mind
evolution.intro: Imagine an astronaut floating in endless space. They see stars, nebulae, distant galaxies — but their vision is limited to a single observation point. This is how today's investment platforms work.
evolution.alt: Astronaut's journey from solo to collective mind

problems.title: Stage 1: Solo Astronaut
problems.description: Traditional platforms are lone explorers making decisions in isolation. They may be brilliant, but their vision is limited to a single point of observation.

problems.title: Stage 2: Group of Explorers
problems.description: A DAO community is a group of astronauts working together. They share observations, discuss hypotheses, and vote for the best solutions.

problems.title: Stage 3: AI Beacons
problems.description: Artificial intelligence becomes cosmic beacons illuminating the path to truth. AI agents analyze data, identify patterns, and propose hypotheses.

problems.title: Stage 4: Collective Intelligence
problems.description: AI + DAO + Blockchain = Collective Intelligence. The system learns from every decision, preserves experience, and evolves together with the community.

process.title: Uniqueness of Approach:
steps: Not static solutions, but dynamic evolution
Not one expert, but collective intelligence
Not closed analytics, but transparent history
Not repeating mistakes, but studying patterns

evolution.quote: We are not just creating a platform — we are creating an ecosystem of collective truth-seeking, where every participant becomes part of something greater.

solution.title: When thousands of astronauts look at the same galaxy
solution.intro: Imagine: thousands of astronauts on different planets, looking at the same galaxy simultaneously. Each sees it from their own angle, from their own perspective. Together they see the complete picture.

problems.title: Mill's Trident Principle
problems.description: In any argument there are only three possibilities: you are right (need criticism to strengthen), partially right (need opposing views), wrong (need free speech to correct).

problems.title: Collective Intelligence
problems.description: When many minds work together, they can solve problems inaccessible to individuals. Different perspectives complement each other.

problems.title: Process Transparency
problems.description: Every decision, every argument, every vote is recorded in an immutable journal. History becomes a teacher.

problems.title: Idea Evolution
problems.description: Truth is not static — it evolves through collective interaction, criticism, verification, constant refinement.

solution.quote: Truth is born not in the solitude of genius, but in collective search, where every contribution matters, every criticism is constructive, every result teaches.

governance.title: Democracy of astronauts
governance.intro: Imagine a space station where every astronaut has the right to vote on expedition course decisions. Not hierarchy, but collective wisdom determines the path to truth.
governance.alt: Astronauts voting on a space station

biases.title: One astronaut — one vote
biases.description: Every DAO participant has equal voting rights, regardless of status or resources. It's not power that matters, but collective wisdom.

biases.title: Transparency of all decisions
biases.description: Every vote, every argument, every result is recorded on blockchain. No secret meetings, no hidden motives.

biases.title: Collective responsibility
biases.description: Decisions are made by the community, and the community is responsible for their consequences. Success and failure are shared.

biases.title: Evolution of rules
biases.description: Governance rules are not static — they evolve with the community. New challenges require new approaches.

process.title: Decision-making process:
steps: Proposal of idea by any participant

governance.quote: There's no room for dictatorship in space. Only collective wisdom can lead an expedition to success.

reflection.title: CosmoFusion DAO
reflection.description: CosmoFusion DAO — is a community where everyone can propose an idea, discuss it with like-minded people and together turn ideas into real solutions. We combine experience, preserve best practices and build an open platform for honest and transparent governance.
